issue.title: winaero.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://winaero.com/download-execti-run-as-trustedinstaller/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwinaero.com%2Fdownload-execti-run-as-trustedinstaller%2F) ### Comment > 2 ads for Outbyte, at least one of which can also be very easily confused for the actual download link. I propose: > ``` > winaero.com###indbl > winaero.com##.windiv > ``` ``` Username: @DandelionSprout ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/7t2apqwnkdgk0c4so8k00kosk4gs4s82tixhljuw9g.png?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- Platform: | uBlock Origin v1.68.0 System version: | `Windows 11 25H2 x64` Browser: | Vivaldi Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Base,
EasyList

Privacy:
AdGuard Tracking Protection

Annoyances:
AdGuard Cookie Notices,
AdGuard Popups,
Dandelion Sprout's Annoyances List

Security:
Online Malicious URL Blocklist,
Phishing URL Blocklist,
uBlock Origin – Badware risks

Language-specific:
EasyList Lithuania,
Adblock List for Finland,
Frellwit's Swedish Filter,
Dandelion Sprout's Nordic Filters,
Dandelion Sprout's Serbo-Croatian List Custom filters: | `uBlock Filters (Ads / Privacy / Unbreak / Cookie Notices / Annoyances)`,
`Bypass Paywalls Clean Filter`,
`EasyList Notifications (uBO's version)`,
`Fanboy's Agegate List`,
`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DandelionSprout/adfilt/master/AntiMV3List.txt`,
`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DandelionSprout/adfilt2/main/AntiCartoonHipsterList.txt` Other extensions used: | `Bitwarden, Redirector, Auto Refresh Plus`

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://winaero.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwinaero.com%2F) ### Comment > Winaero website (https://www.winaero.com) displays just a blank page when AdGuard extension is enabled, but it will display if the extension is disabled. ``` Username: @BeemoKincaid ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/isvlwwrml5c80o0o0o4sw00kssgc0wkly37fv1yctw.png?nc=1)

AdGuard Base,
AdGuard Mobile Ads

Privacy:
AdGuard Tracking Protection,
AdGuard URL Tracking
